sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_usermaster A LEFT JOIN tbl_usermaster_retire B ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = B.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.CN is null AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.CN <> 'masteradmin' AND A.DEPARTMENT NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE '%trash\_dept%' escape '\')
AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#
AND (A.DISPLAYNAME LIKE ('%' || #pSearchText# || '%') ESCAPE '\' OR A.DESCRIPTION LIKE ('%' || #pSearchText# || '%') ESCAPE '\' )

SELECT CN , CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , DEPARTMENT , CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , MOBILE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , STREETADDRESS , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , SIPURI , POSITIONCD , FURIGANA FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND cn = #userID#

SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
)) AS ISLAST, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.CN = #deptID#)) AS EXPAND, DEPTLEVEL as DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #deptID#
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
ORDER BY A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DISPLAYNAME

select.isEqual:
(SELECT CN as userID, CN as deptID, DISPLAYNAME$lang$ as userName, DISPLAYNAME$lang$ as deptName, TO_CHAR(' ') as TITLE, MAIL, null as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, TO_CHAR('deptImage.hyj') as imageName, TENANT_ID, 'dept' as TYPE, null as mobile, null as telephoneNumber, null as jobId, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as userCompanyID, DISPLAYNAME as deptName1, DISPLAYNAME2 as deptName2, DISPLAYNAME as userName1, DISPLAYNAME2 as userName2, CAST('' AS NVARCHAR2(100)) as title1, CAST('' AS NVARCHAR2(100)) as title2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ LIKE ('%' || #deptIDEscape# || '%') ESCAPE '\' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE '%trash\_dept%' escape '\' )
UNION ALL
(SELECT CN as userID, DEPARTMENT as deptID, DISPLAYNAME$lang$ as userName, DESCRIPTION as deptName, TO_CHAR(NVL(TITLE$lang$,' ')) as TITLE, MAIL, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, TO_CHAR(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2) as imageName, TENANT_ID, 'user' as TYPE, mobile, telephoneNumber, null as jobId, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as userCompanyID, DESCRIPTION as deptName1, DESCRIPTION2 as deptName2, DISPLAYNAME as userName1, DISPLAYNAME2 as userName2, TITLE as title1, TITLE2 as title2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ LIKE ('%' || #deptIDEscape# || '%') ESCAPE '\' OR DESCRIPTION$lang$ LIKE ('%' || #deptIDEscape# || '%') ESCAPE '\') AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND DEPARTMENT NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE '%trash\_dept%' escape '\' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
)
PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
) UNION ALL
(SELECT B.CN as userID, A.DEPTID as deptID, B.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ as userName, D.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ as deptName, TO_CHAR(A.TITLE$lang$) as title, B.MAIL, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 -LENGTH(NVL(A.ORDERBY, '0'))), NVL(A.ORDERBY, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, TO_CHAR(B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2) as imageName, B.TENANT_ID, 'addJobUser' as TYPE, B.mobile, B.telephoneNumber, A.JOBID as jobId, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as userCompanyID, D.DISPLAYNAME as deptName1, D.DISPLAYNAME2 as deptName2, B.DISPLAYNAME as userName1, B.DISPLAYNAME2 as userName2, A.TITLE as title1, A.TITLE2 as title2 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.CN = B.CN JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON B.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.DEPTID = D.CN WHERE (B.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ LIKE ('%' || #deptIDEscape# || '%') ESCAPE '\' OR D.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ LIKE ('%' || #deptIDEscape# || '%') ESCAPE '\')
D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
A.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 NULLS FIRST, userName
select.isNotEqual:
(SELECT CN as userID, CN as deptID, DISPLAYNAME$lang$ as userName, DISPLAYNAME$lang$ as deptName, TO_CHAR(' ') as TITLE, MAIL, null as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, TO_CHAR('deptImage.hyj') as imageName, TENANT_ID, 'dept' as TYPE, null as mobile, null as telephoneNumber, null as jobId, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as userCompanyID, DISPLAYNAME as deptName1, DISPLAYNAME2 as deptName2, DISPLAYNAME as userName1, DISPLAYNAME2 as userName2, CAST('' AS NVARCHAR2(100)) as title1, CAST('' AS NVARCHAR2(100)) as title2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #deptID# AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE '%trash\_dept%' escape '\' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT CN as userID, DEPARTMENT as deptID, DISPLAYNAME$lang$ as userName, DESCRIPTION as deptName, TO_CHAR(NVL(TITLE$lang$,' ')) as TITLE, MAIL, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, TO_CHAR(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2) as imageName, TENANT_ID, 'user' as TYPE, mobile, telephoneNumber, null as jobId, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as userCompanyID, DESCRIPTION as deptName1, DESCRIPTION2 as deptName2, DISPLAYNAME as userName1, DISPLAYNAME2 as userName2, TITLE as title1, TITLE2 as title2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #deptID# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) AND DEPARTMENT NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE '%trash\_dept%' escape '\' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#)
USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT B.CN as userID, A.DEPTID as deptID, B.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ as userName, D.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ as deptName, TO_CHAR(A.TITLE$lang$) as title, B.MAIL, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(A.ORDERBY, '0'))), NVL(A.ORDERBY, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, TO_CHAR(B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2) as imageName, B.TENANT_ID, 'addJobUser' as TYPE, B.mobile, B.telephoneNumber, A.JOBID as jobId, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as userCompanyID, D.DISPLAYNAME as deptName1, D.DISPLAYNAME2 as deptName2, B.DISPLAYNAME as userName1, B.DISPLAYNAME2 as userName2, A.TITLE as title1, A.TITLE2 as title2 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.CN = B.CN JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON B.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.DEPTID = D.CN WHERE A.DEPTID = #deptID#
A.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#)
ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 NULLS FIRST, userName

select.isEqual:
SELECT * FROM ( (SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
)) AS ISLAST, 0 AS EXPAND, DEPTLEVEL as DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE '%trash\_dept%' escape '\'
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND CN = 'Top')
UNION ALL
(SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
)) AS ISLAST, 0 AS EXPAND, DEPTLEVEL as DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE '%trash\_dept%' escape '\'
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = 'Top') ) ORDER BY INSTR('Top', DEPTID, 1) desc, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DEPTNAME
select.isNotEqual:
SELECT * FROM ( (SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
) AND A.CN <> A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2) AS ISLAST, 0 AS EXPAND, DEPTLEVEL as DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE '%trash\_dept%' escape '\'
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND CN = #companyID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, CASE WHEN #userSearch# = 'userSearch' THEN (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN AND DEPTLEVEL != '1'
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
)) ELSE (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
)) END ISLAST, 0 AS EXPAND, DEPTLEVEL as DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DEPTLEVEL != '1'
AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE '%trash\_dept%' escape '\'
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #companyID#) ) ORDER BY INSTR(#companyID#, DEPTID, 1) desc, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DEPTNAME

sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( (SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
)) AS ISLAST, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.CN = #deptID#)) AS EXPAND, DEPTLEVEL as DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE '%trash\_dept%' escape '\'
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND CN = #deptID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, CASE WHEN #userSearch# = 'userSearch' THEN (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN AND DEPTLEVEL != '1'
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
)) ELSE (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
)) END ISLAST, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.CN = #deptID#)) AS EXPAND, DEPTLEVEL as DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DEPTLEVEL != '1'
AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE '%trash\_dept%' escape '\'
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #deptID#) ) ORDER BY INSTR(#deptID#, DEPTID, 1) desc, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DEPTNAME

isEqual.isEqual:
SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
)) AS ISLAST, 0 AS EXPAND, DEPTLEVEL as DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE '%trash\_dept%' escape '\'
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = 'Top' ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DEPTNAME
isEqual.isNotEqual:
SELECT * FROM ( (SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
)) AS ISLAST, 1 AS EXPAND, DEPTLEVEL as DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE '%trash\_dept%' escape '\' AND CN IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #deptID#)
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND CN <> #companyID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
)) AS ISLAST, 0 AS EXPAND, DEPTLEVEL as DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE '%trash\_dept%' escape '\' AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #deptID#)
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
) ) ORDER BY INSTR( ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #deptID#), DEPTID, 1) desc, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DEPTNAME

select.isNotEqual:
SELECT * FROM ( (SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
)) AS ISLAST, 1 AS EXPAND, DEPTLEVEL as DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE '%trash\_dept%' escape '\' AND CN IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #deptID#)
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND CN != #companyID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, CASE WHEN (#userSearch# = 'userSearch' AND #deptType# = '2') THEN (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN AND DEPTLEVEL != '1'
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
)) ELSE (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
)) END ISLAST, 0 AS EXPAND, DEPTLEVEL as DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DEPTLEVEL != '1'
AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE '%trash\_dept%' escape '\' AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 IN ( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #deptID#)
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
) ) ORDER BY INSTR(( SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #deptID#), DEPTID, 1) desc, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DEPTNAME

sqlMap.select: SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #deptID#

SELECT A.CN, CASE $lang$ WHEN 1 THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE, CASE $lang$ WHEN 1 THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END Description, CASE $lang$ WHEN 1 THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE COMPNM2 END COMPANY, CASE $lang$ WHEN '1' THEN ROLE ELSE ROLE2 END ROLE FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.DEPTID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #userID# AND A.DEPTID = #deptID# AND A.JOBID = #jobID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
